title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Lenovo India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Lenovo India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenovo India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Lenovo India:
Lenovo India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
